text.en: I feel loved when someone creates a special moment just for us.
text.zh: 当对方为我们创造一个特别的时刻时，我会很有被爱的感觉。

text.en: For me, daily reliability matters more than romantic surprises.
text.zh: 对我来说，日常的可靠比浪漫惊喜更重要。

text.en: Small romantic gestures can stay in my mind for a long time.
text.zh: 一些小小的浪漫表达会让我记很久。

text.en: I care more about whether a relationship works in real life than whether it feels like a movie.
text.zh: 比起像电影一样浪漫，我更在意一段关系在现实生活中是否合适。

text.en: I like love to have a sense of magic or destiny.
text.zh: 我喜欢爱情里有一点命中注定或奇妙感。

text.en: A good match should first make sense in everyday life.
text.zh: 一段合适的关系首先应该在日常生活中说得通。

text.en: I care about the emotional meaning behind gifts or messages.
text.zh: 我很在意礼物或消息背后的情感意义。

text.en: I would rather have practical support than dramatic declarations of love.
text.zh: 比起轰轰烈烈的表白，我更想要实际的支持。

text.en: I enjoy little rituals in love, like anniversaries, songs, or meaningful places.
text.zh: 我喜欢爱情里的小仪式感，比如纪念日、某首歌或有意义的地点。

text.en: Before getting deeply attached, I think about whether our lifestyles fit.
text.zh: 在投入很深之前，我会考虑彼此的生活方式是否合适。

text.en: I feel safer when I know where a relationship is heading.
text.zh: 当我清楚一段关系会走向哪里时，我会更有安全感。

text.en: I prefer relationships that leave enough room for personal freedom.
text.zh: 我更喜欢能保留足够个人自由的关系。

text.en: Clear commitment makes love feel more comfortable to me.
text.zh: 明确的承诺会让我在爱情里更安心。

text.en: I do not like feeling locked into a fixed relationship script too early.
text.zh: 我不喜欢太早被固定的恋爱剧本框住。

text.en: Consistency matters a lot to me when I start caring about someone.
text.zh: 当我开始在意一个人时，稳定一致的态度对我很重要。

text.en: I like love to develop naturally instead of being rushed into labels.
text.zh: 我喜欢感情自然发展，而不是很快被关系标签催着走。

text.en: Unclear signals in a relationship make me uneasy.
text.zh: 关系里模糊不清的信号会让我不安。

text.en: Even in love, I need space to keep my own rhythm.
text.zh: 即使在恋爱里，我也需要空间保持自己的节奏。

text.en: I value loyalty and dependability more than constant excitement.
text.zh: 比起持续的新鲜刺激，我更看重忠诚和可靠。

text.en: A relationship feels better when both people can still explore who they are.
text.zh: 如果两个人仍然能探索自己的生活和可能性，这段关系会让我感觉更好。

text.en: When I like someone, I prefer making my feelings clear.
text.zh: 当我喜欢一个人时，我更倾向于把感觉表达清楚。

text.en: I often show affection through small actions instead of direct words.
text.zh: 我常常通过小行动表达喜欢，而不是直接说出口。

text.en: I would rather ask directly than keep guessing what someone means.
text.zh: 比起一直猜对方什么意思，我宁愿直接问清楚。

text.en: I usually observe carefully before revealing how much I care.
text.zh: 在表现出我有多在意之前，我通常会先仔细观察。

text.en: Honest conversations are the fastest way for me to feel close.
text.zh: 坦诚的对话是让我快速拉近关系的方式。

text.en: I like when two people can understand each other without saying everything out loud.
text.zh: 我喜欢两个人不用把所有话都说出口，也能互相明白。

text.en: If something bothers me in love, I prefer talking about it sooner rather than later.
text.zh: 如果感情里有什么让我介意，我更倾向于早点说出来。

text.en: I sometimes need time before I can put my feelings into words.
text.zh: 我有时需要一些时间，才能把自己的感受说清楚。

text.en: I appreciate clear answers, even when they are not exactly what I hoped for.
text.zh: 即使答案不完全如我所愿，我也会欣赏清楚直接的回应。

text.en: I prefer expressing affection in ways that feel natural instead of announcing it directly.
text.zh: 我更喜欢用自然的方式表达喜欢，而不是很直接地宣布出来。

text.en: My feelings become intense when I really care about someone.
text.zh: 当我真的在意一个人时，我的情绪会变得很强烈。

text.en: I prefer staying calm before reacting to relationship problems.
text.zh: 面对感情问题时，我更倾向于先冷静下来再回应。

text.en: Emotional honesty matters more to me than sounding perfectly reasonable.
text.zh: 对我来说，情感上的真实比听起来完全理性更重要。

text.en: I usually need time to think before making emotional decisions.
text.zh: 在做情感决定前，我通常需要时间思考。

text.en: I want love to feel emotionally alive, not just peaceful.
text.zh: 我希望爱情是有情绪生命力的，而不只是平静。

text.en: I trust feelings more after they have stayed consistent for a while.
text.zh: 当一种感觉持续稳定一段时间后，我才会更相信它。

text.en: I can be deeply affected by small changes in someone's tone or attention.
text.zh: 对方语气或关注度的一点变化，都可能很影响我的感受。

text.en: In love, I try not to let temporary emotions decide everything.
text.zh: 在爱情里，我会尽量不让一时的情绪决定一切。

text.en: I feel closest to someone when we can share feelings openly and deeply.
text.zh: 当我们能坦率而深入地分享感受时，我会觉得最亲近。

text.en: A steady and peaceful bond is more attractive to me than emotional highs and lows.
text.zh: 比起情绪的大起大落，稳定平和的连接更吸引我。
